title: LandformCraft v2 export job snapshot (v2)
description: Durable record of one asynchronous v2 Release 2 export job: which request and release it produces, which of the two export forms it runs, its lifecycle state and progress, and the last operator-facing message. Written on every transition so job status survives a restart. This is a v2 contract in its own right and does not extend the frozen v1 generation-job schema.

jobVersion.description: Export job contract version. Unknown values are rejected.

jobId.description: Canonical lowercase UUID of this job. Also the file name, so it can never resolve outside the job store.

requestId.description: requestId of the v2 generation request this job exports. Release format 2 manifests carry no request identity, so this field is what makes request-scoped candidate enumeration possible.

releaseId.description: Release identifier this job publishes under the exports root.

kind.description: GENERATE publishes the strict Release directory only; EXPORT also publishes the ZIP and verifies placement eligibility.

state.description: Lifecycle state. PUBLISHED, CANCELLED and FAILED are terminal; a CANCELLED job never published a Release.

progressMillionths.description: Coarse progress in millionths. Integer so a snapshot never depends on floating point formatting.

updatedAt.description: Canonical UTC instant of the last transition.

message.description: Operator-facing description of the last transition. Never contains an absolute path or a confirmation token.
